name: Peanut Butter Breakfast Spread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup finely chopped dried fruit (such as raisins, dates, apricots, figs, prunes, or apples)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the peanut butter and honey until smooth.
2. Gradually stir in the chopped dried fruit until well combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to a tightly covered container and store at room temperature.
4. To serve, spread on warm toast or muffin.
5. Makes 1 1/2 cups of spread.
